description: A colorful painting showing three or four costumed figures reclining and lounging in a lush garden setting. The figures wear elaborate theatrical costumes — one in blue, another in pink with a white ruff — amid abundant red and white flowers and green foliage. The overall tone is playful and decorative, evoking a fete galante or theatrical pastoral scene. The brushwork is loose and vibrant, emphasizing color and movement over precise detail.
